headline: Exceptional Results Drive Growth at Ross Stores (ROST)
summary: TimesSquare Capital Management, an equity investment management company, released its “U.S. Mid Cap Growth Strategy” first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Strategy fell 7.72% (net) in the quarter compared to -6.35% for the Russell Midcap Growth Index. In the first quarter, markets navigated geopolitical tensions and economic resilience […]

headline: 2 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks to Research Further and 1 We Ignore
summary: Wall Street has set ambitious price targets for the stocks in this article. While this suggests attractive upside potential, it’s important to remain skeptical because analysts face institutional pressures that can sometimes lead to overly optimistic forecasts.

headline: Ross Stores (ROST) Rose on a Favorable Consumer Environment
summary: Madison Investments, an investment advisor, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter for the “Madison Mid Cap Fund”. The Madison Mid Cap Fund (Class I) declined 4.28% in the quarter, compared to the Russell Midcap Index’s 1.29% return. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The first quarter saw a market shift from tech […]
